scripts.build: echo 'No build for server code. Skipping...'
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint
scripts.dev: uv run python -m flask --app run run --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5000 --debug
scripts.pkg:install: uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.run: uv run python -m flask --app run run --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5000
scripts.start: uv run python -m flask --app run run --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-5000}
scripts.db:migrate: uv run python -m flask --app run db upgrade
